messages.body: Hello? Hello? From where you are calling me?

Hello Paulette, Good evening!  I found your salon on Groupon, and I’m assuming I’m speaking to the owner- apologies in advance if I got the name wrong, I actually tried checking your GBP before messaging you!  This is Si…
Hello good evening this is monarch laser therapy how may we help you ?
i want to help you out with couple of paid clients without commisions
I want to ask, how about the English of Jesus Christ?
Hey, This is Dan from Zoca.com I saw you are offering discounts on groupon would it be relevant to you if we can get you clients at full price and also without taking commission ?
Please leave your message for 240-600-4454.
Heyy Kierra, Please do check this once!

Hi Kierra, Yes, I checked with the team, and your refund has already been processed. It should reflect in your account within 7–8 business days as per the bank’s policy. Thank you for your patience, and please don’t worr…
Thank you so much
Okay i will be waiting
Hello so did i get refunded for the 299.99 that i was charged ?
Sure Kierra, will send you the confirmation shortly!
Okay i need confirmation of refund
Hi Kierra,  Let me check this with my team and help you with the confirmation for cancellation.
I also need help with how to remove you all from the google
Hello touchin bases with you again i havent recieved a confirmation for refund please send that as soon as possible
Hello i havent recieved the confirmation yet for the refund!
Okay thank you and can you send me confirmation that the refund is being issued.

Hi Kierra, Your subscription has been successfully cancelled. I’ll share the official confirmation with you by tomorrow. Rest assured, there will be no further charges moving forward.  Thank you for your time with us —We…
Also i just recived a email saying i was gonna be chrarged for the next months subscription
I dont want to continue using services
It was a impulsive decision and i dont think i was given enough time to make a decision and fully go through everything

As i stated the contract is not signed so i dont have to move foward. My decision is already made thank you. Please do as i say with processing refund as soon as possible if not i will talk to my bank.
Kierra as discussed, over the call will update you tomorrow after having discussion with my team!

Hi Kierra, I completely understand your concerns, and I want you to feel fully supported. We've already started seeing results, and I’d love the chance to walk you through everything so you can truly see the value we’re …
Yes just cancel contract moving foward and issue refund
I understand the importance of call but im very busy and limited time so wont ge long
Hello
Hi Kierra,  I completely understand your concern, but i would request to get on a call today once and then accordingly we can take it forward for the off boarding process!!
Okay today will work at 1pm eastern if you have time

I'm on a call with a therapist. How may I help you? Hi, Kiara. She's calling you from Zoka. Hi. How are you? How's everything? Doing good. How about yourself? How may I help you? Kiara, I wanted to have a short conversat…
